description: Single-module Maven project: plain Java + a Kotlin file, three planted defects; network bridge so Qodana auto-downloads projectJDK 17 (Community is free — no license token). Shape guards (tool driver, qodanaSeverity) over one SARIF. DuplicatedCode is intentionally omitted (Ultimate-only, absent from the Community profile).

expectations.reason: Planted `a == b` on String surfaces as StringEquality (CI-confirmed id).
Planted empty catch surfaces as CatchMayIgnoreException (CI-confirmed; the bare EmptyCatchBlock inspection is not in this profile).

An always-true `name != null` on a non-null val must report KotlinConstantConditions (force-enabled via qodana.yaml include + kotlin-maven-plugin registers src/main/kotlin); confirm the exact id from the CI run.
